rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Reimbursements Of Benefits Provided To Carol And Summary Judgement
rulings.Rulings: continued to november 5, 2019, as noted previously by the judicial officer, these petitions cannot go forward until the issue of who is acting as trustee (notice, etc.) is settled. deadline for filing is noon on tuesday, october 29, 2019. Examiner still does not have a file stamped copy of this petition. if nothing is filed, an appearance will be required on november 5 for the judge to determine whether the petition should be taken off calendar. please note, any motion for summary judgment must be filed as such and set on the law and motion calendar after obtaining a hearing time and date from the courtroom clerk.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF REGINA POTASCHER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to november 5, 2019. an amended final inventory was filed, which means the final account must also be amended, as it must begin with the value on the final I & A. deadline for providing a file stamped copy of the amended petition and POS of the NOH is noon on october 29, 2019. in addition, the examiner still has not received a file stamped copy of Ms. Hall's Declaration in Support of Extraordinary Fees and Note #1 from the examiner (re notice under 9202(b)) has not yet been answered by the personal representative. As discussed with Counsel, the allegation in the petition re notice under this code section was incomplete.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ALMA DOROTHEA TIKKER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/26/19 to follow closing of related estate. (No earlier date available.) "First Supplement" filed on 9/16/19 does not adequately address the issues raised by the Examiner. Attaching schedules from another estate does not support the statutory fee in this case, and simply pointing to the incomplete attorney fee declaration filed previously does not meet the requirements of CRC 7.702. (Examiner's Notes are not filed for the record. Supplements or amendments should stand on their own and not refer to Examiner's Notes.)
